chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 642 of 2015 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.6258/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.6259/2025 (R/Surety) 06.11.2025 Mr. Aftab Ahmed Malano, Advocate for applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. This application has been filed by applicant Niaz Hussain seeking return of surety documents. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Malikuddin Mahar was granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 13.08.2015, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/-, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing original solvency certificate No.25 dated 12.08.2015, issued by the Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Taluka Salehpat. Thereafter, interim pre-arrest bail of accused was confirmed by this Court vide order dated 14.04.2016. Subsequently, the accused has been acquitted by the learned trial Court, as is evident from the order dated 02.09.2016, annexed with this application. Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, learned Deputy Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
